extraction.ocr_text:
What are the top features of UiPath platform when it comes to AI safety?

I'll search for information about UiPath platform's AI safety features.

Ran 'UiPath Security data' for 3.18 seconds

Based on the UiPath security documentation, here are the top AI safety features of the UiPath platform:

Key AI Safety Features

1.AI Trust Layer (AITL)

Harmful content filtering is automatically applied on all AI models going through the AI Trust Layer, ensuring end-users are not exposed to potentially harmful AI-generated content 1 . All LLM traffic flows through AITL, enforcing strict data handling standards.

2.Stateless AI Models

All models used are stateless, so any previously processed data is not accessible. This helps ensure that all users interacting with the AI model do not gain access to unauthorized information by querying the model 1.

UiPath AI Trust Layer (AITL),
GenAI, and Agentic Security
Handbook.pdf (Page 26)

3.Continuous Monito[...]

Regular security and risk checks are pe[...]
the provided services. The performance and
maintenance of UiPath LLMs are regularly monitored to prevent bias and model drift 1 .

4.No Third-Party Data Retention

All LLM traffic flows through the AITL, which enforces UiPath's strict data handling standards ensuring no third-party data retention,
logging, or model training occurs 2 .

The agent has answered a question about AI safety features, citing information retrieved from a context source named 'UiPath Security data'. A citation popover is open over the response, highlighting the source document 'UiPath AI Trust Layer (AITL), GenAI, and Agentic Security Handbook.pdf (Page 26)'.
extraction.step_instructions: Click on the citation marker "1" in the response text to view the source reference. Review the citation popover showing the document name and page number to verify the answer is grounded in the selected context source.
